'''Sarahwiee''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] [[Bseto]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. A [[Water/Legends|frozen]] planet, with a [[Local day/Legends|local day]] of 28 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] long, and a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of 389 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. The planet was discovered shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Order|declaration]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] kept its location a secret.

The planet was the site of a research base. After the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Alexandra Winger]] led agents of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to the base on an [[Mission to Sarahwiee|infiltration mission]]. The mission, part of a contracted supply run, allowed the New Republic operatives to free captive scientists, including [[Carl Barzon]].

{{Planet-stub}}
